data.title: WCC Biomedical will showcase WINMAP™ microarray patch technology at NACDS Total Store Expo with 2 new products.
data.description: In Taipei on August 8, 2025, WCC Biomedical, a prominent company specializing in innovative drug delivery solutions, announced its participation in the upcoming NACDS Total Store Expo (TSE). During the event, WCC Biomedical will showcase its exclusive WINMAP™ microarray patch (MAP) technology and introduce two new products to the market. The company aims to highlight the benefits and applications of the WINMAP™ technology at the exhibition.

data.title: Avangrid hosts NHCSL Summer Meeting in Boston, convening 100 Hispanic state legislators to discuss pressing issues.
data.description: Avangrid, Inc., a prominent energy company part of the Iberdrola Group, recently organized the Summer Meeting of the National Hispanic Caucus of State Legislators (NHCSL) in Boston, MA. The event brought together close to 100 Hispanic state legislators from various parts of the United States to discuss crucial national issues, such as the increasing energy demand. Avangrid played a vital role in coordinating this gathering, which aimed to facilitate strategic dialogues.

data.title: CAE market to hit $19.96B by 2030, growing at 10.2% CAGR led by Ansys, Autodesk, & Dassault. Shift to cloud-based solutions driving growth, offering scalability & accessibility for engineers. AI & ML transforming CAE processes. Major players include Ansys, Autodesk, Dassault Systèmes, Siemens, and more.
data.description: The Computer-aided Engineering (CAE) Market is anticipated to witness significant growth, increasing from USD 12.28 billion in 2025 to USD 19.96 billion by 2030, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 10.2%. This growth is primarily fueled by the shift towards cloud-based simulation due to benefits like scalability, cost-efficiency, and accessibility. Leading companies such as Ansys, Siemens, and Dassault Systèmes are expanding their cloud-enabled CAE offerings, allowing engineers to conduct simulations without heavy upfront infrastructure, benefiting remote teams and Small and Medium Enterprises (SMEs). This enhancement leads to faster collaboration, reduced time-to-market, and increased flexibility in design processes. The CAE market dynamics include drivers such as advanced simulation techniques, EVs, autonomous vehicles, IoT, and 3D printing, as well as challenges like high initial setup costs and data security concerns with cloud-based CAE. AI and Machine Learning (ML) are revolutionizing CAE by enabling quicker simulation and intelligent design, including generative design through AI-driven CAE platforms. Key companies in the CAE market include Ansys, Autodesk, Dassault Systèmes, Hexagon AB, Siemens, among others. The full story can be accessed on Benzinga.com. For more details, visit https://www.marketsandmarkets.com/pdfdownloadNew.asp?id=33357366.

data.title: TransferMate receives approval from Monetary Authority of Singapore to add payment services; TransferMate Pte. Ltd. approved.
data.description: On August 8, 2025, in Dublin, TransferMate declared that TransferMate Pte. Ltd. was granted initial approval by the Monetary Authority of Singapore (MAS) for account issuance services. TransferMate is known as the top provider of embedded B2B payments Infrastructure as a Service (IaaS) globally. This recent development allows TransferMate to further expand its services in the region.

data.title: Flutter Entertainment PLC (NYSE: FLUT) beats Q2 expectations with revenue of $4.19B (up 16% YoY) and EPS of $2.95. Analysts up forecasts.
data.description: Flutter Entertainment PLC (NYSE: FLUT) exceeded expectations with its second-quarter financial results released after market close on Thursday. The company reported a revenue of $4.19 billion for the quarter, showing a 16% increase compared to the previous year. This figure surpassed the Street's estimate of $4.06 billion. Additionally, Flutter reported adjusted earnings per share of $2.95, outperforming the Street's expectation of $2.05. The CEO expressed satisfaction with the strong performance in the second quarter and highlighted progress on key initiatives. For more details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: EuroHoldings Ltd. to release Q2 2025 financial results on Aug 12, 2025. NASDAQ: EHLD. Ocean-going vessels operator.
data.description: EuroHoldings Ltd. (NASDAQ: EHLD), a company based in Athens, Greece, specializing in ocean-going vessels and seaborne transportation services, revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the second quarter of 2025 on August 12, 2025. The report is scheduled to be released prior to the opening of the New York market.

data.title: Capstone Green Energy ($CGEH) announces Q1 fiscal results for 2026 ending June 30, 2025, focusing on Three Pillar strategy.
data.description: In Los Angeles, Capstone Green Energy Holdings, Inc. (OTCID: CGEH), the public successor to Capstone Green Energy Corporation, released its financial report for Q1 of fiscal year 2026, concluding on June 30, 2025. The company emphasized its commitment to the Three Pillar strategy, concentrating on financial stability, sustainable practices, and fostering a positive company culture. This strategy aims to instigate transformative behaviors within the organization.

data.title: Dow Jones futures up, Under Armour plunges 22% on earnings warning. Trade Desk, Pinterest, Twilio also drop.
data.description: Today in the stock market, Dow Jones futures experienced an increase while Under Armour witnessed a significant drop of 22% following their earnings report. Similarly, Trade Desk, Pinterest, and Twilio also experienced declines in their stock prices. The overall market saw mixed results, with investors closely monitoring these movements. The Dow Jones futures rise was a notable trend amidst the negative performances of these companies. The situation was covered live by Investor's Business Daily, providing continuous updates on the dynamic market conditions.

data.title: New England Realty Associates LP will distribute the third-quarter on Sept 30, 2025, to Class A Partners and holders.
data.description: A distribution by New England Realty Associates Limited Partnership (NYSE MKT: NEN) to its Class A Limited Partners and Depositary Receipt holders is scheduled for September 30, 2025. Shareholders must be recorded as of September 15, 2025, to receive the quarterly distribution.

data.title: Haemonetics Corp beats Q1 earnings, reports $1.10 EPS and $321.394 million in sales. Analysts revise forecasts. Stock closes at $55.63.
data.description: Haemonetics Corp (NYSE: HAE) announced positive first-quarter earnings, surpassing analyst expectations. The company reported quarterly earnings of $1.10 per share, exceeding the consensus estimate of $1.02 per share. Quarterly sales stood at $321.394 million, also surpassing the analyst consensus of $305.115 million. Haemonetics confirmed its FY2026 adjusted EPS guidance in the range of $4.70 to $5.00. The company's shares closed at $55.63 on Thursday. Analysts adjusted their price targets for Haemonetics post the earnings release. For the detailed story, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Terreno Realty Corp sells property in Santa Fe Springs, CA for $11.0 million.
data.description: In Bellevue, Washington, Terreno Realty Corporation has recently completed the sale of a property located in Santa Fe Springs, California for a total of $11.0 million.

data.title: Square stock rises after Q2 results despite missing targets. Cash App banking gains traction, driving positive business trends.
data.description: In the second quarter, Square reported earnings and revenue that were slightly below Wall Street forecasts. Despite this, Square stock saw a rise due to positive trends in the business, with certain financial indicators surpassing expectations. The success of Cash App banking contributed to this growth. The overall performance of Square was seen as promising by investors, leading to an uptick in the stock value.

data.title: Malayan Insurance in Philippines achieves IFRS 17 readiness with SAS technology two years early.
data.description: A top non-life insurance company has successfully met the global standard with advanced SAS technology well ahead of schedule. Malayan Insurance, a major non-life insurer in the Philippines, has become one of the first companies in the country to achieve complete readiness for IFRS 17, reaching this milestone two years earlier than expected. This accomplishment highlights the company's commitment to meeting industry regulations and ensuring financial compliance.
